equipment.name: Rune Manacles of the Lost Dynasty

explanations: Finalists were recalculated through the complete build calculator.
Known set effects were included.
Set bonus active: Ancestral Armor at 2 pieces (6/6 equipped).
Set bonus active: Ancestral Armor at 4 pieces (6/6 equipped).
Set bonus active: Ancestral Armor at 6 pieces (6/6 equipped).

Heroic Calanthia's Touch: Effect 1: Max Health +1,650 — feeds #1 Max Health; alternatives: Perception +11, Fortitude +11, Evasion +220. Effect 2: Hit Chance +220 — feeds #6 PvP Melee Hit Chance; alternatives: Perception +11, Fortitude +11, Evasion +220. Effect 3: Melee Hit Chance +220 — feeds #6 PvP Melee Hit Chance; alternatives: Perception +11, Fortitude +11, Evasion +220.

Heroic Choking Conviction: Effect 1: Max Health +1,650 — feeds #1 Max Health; alternatives: Dexterity +11, Wisdom +11, Perception +11. Effect 2: Heavy Attack Evasion +220 — feeds #2 PvP Heavy Attack Evasion; alternatives: Dexterity +11, Wisdom +11, Perception +11. Effect 3: Hit Chance +220 — feeds #6 PvP Melee Hit Chance; alternatives: Dexterity +11, Wisdom +11, Perception +11.
Main Hand: Attack Defense Assist supplies +4 Strength toward attribute milestones.
Off Hand: Attack Defense Assist supplies +4 Strength toward attribute milestones.
Head: Attack Defense Assist supplies +2 Strength toward attribute milestones.
Hands: Attack Defense Assist supplies +2 Perception toward attribute milestones.
Necklace: Attack Assist Defense supplies +3 Wisdom toward attribute milestones.
Ring 1: Attack Defense Assist supplies +3 Strength toward attribute milestones.
Ring 2: Attack Defense Assist supplies +3 Strength toward attribute milestones.
Max Health: 58546.17 at priority 1; normalized contribution +0.457.

PvP Heavy Attack Evasion: 13470 at priority 2; normalized contribution +0.055; components PvP Melee Heavy Attack Evasion 1,527, PvP Ranged Heavy Attack Evasion 1,347, PvP Magic Heavy Attack Evasion 1,575.
Block Chance: 5230 at priority 3; normalized contribution +0.007.
Damage Reduction: 269 at priority 4; normalized contribution +0.003.

CC Resistances: 20160 at priority 5; normalized contribution +0.001; components Weaken Resistance 534, Stun Resistance 934, Petrification Resistance 504, Sleep Resistance 604, Silence Resistance 604, Fear Resistance 504, Bind Resistance 1,283, Collision Resistance 1,217.
PvP Melee Hit Chance: 36044 at priority 6; normalized contribution +0.025; minimum 30000 met.
No selected goal finished below the fixed objective baseline.
assumptions: Item Potentials are excluded from calculations and recommendations in this release; same-item selections are preserved.
59 available attribute points were redistributed across STR, DEX, INT, PER, and CON.
This is a theoretical catalogue build. Ownership and acquisition cost are not scored.
Eight passive skills were selected at up to level 20.
Sword mastery uses 220 of 220 available points.
Dagger mastery uses 220 of 220 available points.
Only decoded-proven persistent Skill Cores are optimized; conditional or unsupported cores receive no invented static value.
The game allows repeated Equipment Skills, but exact scoring activates only one copy in the current fixed-level catalogue.
Exactly three normal rune sockets are considered; normal rune rows may repeat.
No more than one Chaos rune is used per item.
warnings: This is a bounded search, so the result is the best loadout found rather than proof of the mathematical global optimum.
